title: bromus hordeaceus var. conglomeratus
intro: Bromus hordeaceus var. conglomeratus, also known as hard brome, is a perennial grass species belonging to the Poaceae family, commonly found in meadows and pastures across Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bromus hordeaceus var. conglomeratus include its ability to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and constipation, as well as its use as a natural remedy for respiratory problems like coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a powder to harness its medicinal properties.
